reasoning: The E2 interface is the root cause of the failure. High uplink packet loss and downlink latency on the2 interface are causing instability in the O-DU, which in turn affects the F1-c and F1-u interfaces and the O-CU's performance.
actionable_steps: Perform a physical and logical audit of the E2 interface link between the Near-RT RIC and the O-DU. Check for hardware faults in the O-DU network interface card (NIC) or the E2 agent configuration on the O-DU.
